title: Swift Hud
description: A lightweight HUD mod that shows key info like health, armor, FPS, and coordinates in a clean, customizable way.
body: A clean and customizable HUD mod that enhances your Minecraft experience by displaying essential info right on your screen — from health, armor, and hunger to FPS, coordinates, and more. Designed to be lightweight, minimal, and fully adjustable to fit your playstyle.
